data.title: Hick’s Law
data.technical_spec: User interface designed to minimize decision time with an intuitive experience.

data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Optimizes touch target sizes on mobile devices.
data.technical_spec: Large and easy-to-click buttons to enhance accessibility.

data.title: Miller’s Law
data.technical_spec: Messages and notifications are grouped for better cognitive processing.

data.title: Jakob’s Law
data.technical_spec: UI design mirrors widely-adopted patterns for faster user adaptation.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: Design perceived as more usable if it’s aesthetically pleasing.
data.technical_spec: WhatsApp employs a clean, user-friendly interface with a focus on simplicity.
